name: alltrails-mcp
description: Unofficial AllTrails tools for Claude — search trails, get details, reviews, photos, and your saved lists

alltrails_cookie.title: AllTrails Cookie header
alltrails_cookie.description: A Cookie header copied from a signed-in alltrails.com browser tab (must include the short-lived datadome cookie). Optional — if omitted, the server falls back to the fetchproxy browser extension (requires being signed in to alltrails.com in your browser).

alltrails_user_id.title: AllTrails user id
alltrails_user_id.description: Optional numeric AllTrails user id for the per-user tools (saved lists, completed trails, activity feed). If omitted, those tools resolve the signed-in user via /api/alltrails/me.

tools.name: alltrails_get_trail
tools.description: Get details for a trail by its numeric id

tools.name: alltrails_get_trail_reviews
tools.description: Get user reviews for a trail

tools.name: alltrails_get_trail_weather
tools.description: Get the weather overview for a trail

tools.name: alltrails_search
tools.description: Search AllTrails by trail or place name

tools.name: alltrails_get_profile
tools.description: Get the signed-in AllTrails user profile

tools.name: alltrails_list_user_lists
tools.description: List a user's saved lists / favorites
